case_title: HARRIET A LARKIN-JONES VS. NEW DIRECTION 21ST CENTURY,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARKIN-JONES, HARRIET A AS TO DEFENDANT NEW DIRECTION 21ST CENTURY,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO N JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
